evals.prompt: Write me query to get Firefox DAU
evals.expected_output: A query using active_users_aggregates with app_name filter, submission_date partition filter, SUM(dau), and clients/profiles terminology

assertions.name: uses_active_users_aggregates
assertions.description: Uses the official source-of-truth table active_users_aggregates, not raw baseline or clients_daily

assertions.name: filters_app_name
assertions.description: Filters by app_name for Firefox Desktop
assertions.check: query.sql contains app_name filter with 'Firefox Desktop'

assertions.name: uses_submission_date
assertions.description: Uses submission_date (DATE) partition filter, not submission_timestamp

assertions.name: uses_sum_dau
assertions.description: Uses SUM(dau) for aggregation, not COUNT DISTINCT client_id
assertions.check: query.sql contains 'SUM(dau)' or similar aggregation on the dau column

assertions.name: correct_terminology
assertions.description: Says 'clients' or 'profiles' in explanation, not 'users' when referring to counted entities
assertions.check: response.md does not refer to counted entities as 'users' (the word 'users' in table/column names is OK)

evals.prompt: I need to analyze activity_stream click events in Firefox Desktop over the last week, broken down by country
evals.expected_output: A query using events_stream with event_category filter, partition filter, country dimension, and sample_id

assertions.name: uses_events_stream
assertions.description: Uses events_stream table, not raw events_v1 with UNNEST

assertions.name: filters_event_category
assertions.check: query.sql contains filter for activity_stream event category

assertions.name: has_partition_filter
assertions.description: Includes DATE(submission_timestamp) partition filter with ~7 day range
assertions.check: query.sql contains DATE(submission_timestamp) with date range filter

assertions.name: has_country_dimension
assertions.description: Includes country breakdown using normalized_country_code or metadata.geo.country
assertions.check: query.sql contains country field in SELECT and GROUP BY

assertions.name: has_sample_id
assertions.description: Includes sample_id filter for development/cost savings

evals.prompt: How many people use Firefox on Android?
evals.expected_output: Corrects terminology, uses active_users_aggregates with Android app_name, includes partition filter

assertions.name: corrects_terminology
assertions.description: Addresses that BigQuery tracks clients/profiles, not people/users
assertions.check: response.md mentions clients or profiles distinction

assertions.name: uses_aggregates_table
assertions.description: Uses active_users_aggregates as the source-of-truth table

assertions.name: correct_android_app_name
assertions.description: Filters by correct Android app_name (Fenix or similar)
assertions.check: query.sql contains app_name filter for Android product
